summary: Cached Array.isArray in a module-level variable to avoid repeated property lookups. Performance improved ~1% (5.79M to 5.84M ops/sec). The optimization reduces the overhead of accessing Array.isArray on each toVal() invocation.

Replaced string concatenation with array collection and join(). Performance decreased significantly from 5.83M to 2.01M ops/sec (65% regression). For this use case with many small concatenations, string concatenation is faster than building an array and joining.
